subject: Cannot connect Slack integration — keeps failing
message: Hi, I've been trying to connect our Slack workspace to NexaFlow for the past two days and it keeps saying 'Authentication failed'. I've tried re-authorizing three times. Our team relies heavily on Slack notifications and this is blocking our daily workflow. Can you please help urgently?
expected_resolution: Ask customer to re-authenticate Slack integration via Settings > Integrations > Slack > Reconnect. Token may have expired. If issue persists, check if Slack app was removed from workspace.

subject: How do I set up automation for due date reminders?
message: Hello NexaFlow team, I'm trying to create an automation that sends a Slack message to my team 2 days before a task is due. I found the automation rules section but I'm not sure how to configure the trigger and action correctly. Could you walk me through it step by step?
expected_resolution: Guide customer: Automations > New Rule > Trigger: 'Due date approaching (2 days)' > Action: 'Send Slack message' > configure channel and message template > Save.

subject: Upgrade to Growth plan — billing question
message: Hi, I want to upgrade from Starter to Growth plan. We now have 8 team members. Will the upgrade take effect immediately? Will I be charged for the full month or prorated? Also, can I get an invoice sent to our company GST number?
expected_resolution: Upgrade takes effect immediately with prorated charge. Go to Settings > Billing > Change Plan. For invoice customization (GST), note this is supported — customer can add tax ID at Settings > Billing > Tax Information.

subject: Tasks not syncing to Google Calendar
message: I connected Google Calendar last week and it was working fine, but for the past 3 days my task due dates are no longer appearing in my calendar. I haven't changed any settings. The integration still shows as 'Connected' in NexaFlow.
expected_resolution: Common cause: Google OAuth token revoked by user's Google account settings. Ask customer to go to Settings > Integrations > Google Calendar > Disconnect and reconnect. Also check if they changed Google account password recently (triggers token revocation).

subject: Need to understand user permission levels
message: We're onboarding 5 new contractors and I want them to only see specific projects, not the whole workspace. I understand there's a Guest role — can guests see task comments? Can they add attachments? Also, how do I make sure they can't accidentally delete anything?
expected_resolution: Guest role: read-only access to specific invited projects. Cannot add comments, attachments, or delete anything. To invite as Guest: Settings > Members > Invite > select Guest role > specify which projects. Confirm this covers their use case.

subject: This is completely broken — I'm cancelling if not fixed TODAY
message: I am absolutely furious right now. For the THIRD time this week, all my automation rules have stopped firing. I have an entire operations team of 12 people whose workflows depend on this. We missed two critical deadlines because your system failed. I've already emailed twice this week with no resolution. I demand to speak to a manager or senior engineer immediately. If this isn't resolved today I am cancelling our Growth subscription and disputing the charge.
expected_resolution: Immediate escalation required: sentiment < 0.3, explicit human request, 3+ unanswered follow-ups. Assign to senior support engineer. Investigate automation rule failure in logs. Offer service credit for downtime.

subject: Requesting a refund for annual subscription
message: Hello, I signed up for the annual Growth plan 8 days ago. After using it, I realize it doesn't fit our team's workflow as I had hoped. The automation features don't support the conditional logic we need. I'd like to request a refund for the annual subscription. Can you process this? Our invoice number is INV-2026-00487.
expected_resolution: Escalate to billing team. Customer is within 14-day refund window for annual subscription. Verify invoice INV-2026-00487. Process refund (5-7 business days). Log escalation reason: refund_request.

subject: Setting up NexaFlow for first time — getting started
message: Hi, we just signed up for the Growth plan yesterday. We're a 12-person product team. I've created the workspace and invited everyone. What's the best way to get started? Should we use templates or build workflows from scratch? Any recommended first steps for a product team?
expected_resolution: Recommend: start with the 'Product Team' template from the template library. Suggest connecting Slack first for notifications. Walk through onboarding checklist: first workflow, first automation rule, assign roles. Point to video tutorials at help.nexaflow.io.

subject: GitHub integration not creating issues automatically
message: I set up the GitHub integration and it's showing as connected, but when I complete a task in NexaFlow that has a linked GitHub repo, no issue is being created. I followed the setup guide exactly. Is there a specific task field I need to fill in to trigger the GitHub issue creation?
expected_resolution: GitHub issue creation requires: 1) automation rule configured (not just integration connected), 2) the trigger set to 'Task status changed to Complete', 3) repo selected in action config. Walk customer through creating the automation rule.

subject: Can I export all our project data to CSV?
message: We're doing a quarterly review and our CFO needs all task completion data exported to a spreadsheet. Is there a way to export everything to CSV? We have about 15 projects with roughly 2,000 tasks total. Will the export include task history and comments?
expected_resolution: Yes, CSV export available at Settings > Data & Privacy > Export Data. Select CSV format, scope to all projects. Export includes tasks and project data but NOT comments by default. For comments, suggest JSON export which is more comprehensive. Mention 15-minute processing time.

subject: How to cancel subscription
message: Hi, I need to cancel our NexaFlow subscription at the end of this month. We're a startup that had to downsize and can no longer afford the Growth plan. Can you walk me through the cancellation process? Will we lose our data immediately?
expected_resolution: Guide to Settings > Billing > Cancel Subscription. Cancellation takes effect end of billing cycle. Data retained 90 days post-cancellation. Suggest exporting data before cancelling. Offer to downgrade to Starter (free) as alternative to full cancellation.

subject: Webhook timeouts causing integration failures
message: We've built a custom webhook receiver that NexaFlow sends events to. It works fine for small payloads, but when we have bulk task updates (50+ tasks updated at once), we're getting webhook timeout errors and events are being dropped. Our server processes these synchronously. Is there a way to increase the timeout or batch the events differently?
expected_resolution: NexaFlow webhook timeout is 10 seconds — cannot be extended. Recommend customer make webhook endpoint async (respond 200 immediately, process in background queue). Also mention that bulk updates send individual webhook events per task, not batched. Enterprise customers can request event batching.

subject: Mobile app not showing tasks assigned to me
message: I just downloaded the iOS app (iPhone 14, iOS 17.3) and when I log in, I can see the workspace but none of my assigned tasks are showing. On the web version everything is fine. I tried logging out and back in on the app but still the same issue.
expected_resolution: Known intermittent issue: iOS app cache corruption after first install. Fix: log out > go to iPhone Settings > NexaFlow > Clear Cache > log back in. If persists, uninstall and reinstall app. Escalate to engineering if reinstall doesn't resolve.

subject: Inquiry about Enterprise plan features
message: We're currently on Growth and considering upgrading to Enterprise. I wanted to understand: does Enterprise include SSO (SAML)? What analytics are included? And is the dedicated CSM a real person or an AI? Also, can we get a trial of Enterprise features before committing?
expected_resolution: Enterprise includes: SSO (SAML 2.0), advanced analytics dashboard, dedicated human CSM, API access, unlimited automations, custom billing. No free trial for Enterprise — offer a demo call with the sales team. Connect customer with sales@nexaflow.io for Enterprise trial discussion. Cannot share undisclosed pricing.

subject: Jira sync is creating duplicate tickets
message: Since setting up the Jira integration, every time a NexaFlow task is updated, a new Jira issue is being created instead of updating the existing one. I now have hundreds of duplicate Jira issues. This is a serious problem. How do I fix this and prevent future duplicates?
expected_resolution: This is a misconfiguration: the automation rule is set to 'Create Jira issue' on every update instead of being limited to initial task creation. Fix: edit the automation rule trigger to fire only on 'Task created' (not 'Task updated'). For existing duplicates, bulk-close in Jira. Cannot auto-delete — manual cleanup required.

subject: Team member role change not taking effect
message: I changed one of our team members from Member to Admin three days ago but they're still not able to access the integrations settings. I've confirmed the role change shows Admin in our Members list. Is there something additional I need to do for the change to take effect?
expected_resolution: Role changes take effect immediately but require the affected user to log out and log back in (session token needs to refresh). Ask the team member to sign out completely and sign back in. If issue persists after re-login, escalate for engineering investigation.

subject: Can NexaFlow integrate with Microsoft Teams?
message: We love NexaFlow but our company recently mandated Microsoft Teams as the main communication platform. We currently use the Slack integration but would need to switch. Is there a Microsoft Teams integration available or planned?
expected_resolution: Microsoft Teams integration is not currently available. Do not speculate about roadmap. Workaround: use Teams + webhooks (Enterprise) to push NexaFlow notifications to Teams via incoming webhook connector. Suggest customer submit feature request via the feedback portal at nexaflow.io/feedback.

subject: API rate limit — need higher limits for Enterprise
message: We're on the Enterprise plan and building an internal dashboard that pulls NexaFlow data. We're hitting the 1,000 requests/hour rate limit frequently. We need at minimum 10,000 requests/hour for our use case. Is there a way to increase this? We're happy to pay for it.
expected_resolution: Enterprise rate limit is 1,000 req/hour by default. Higher limits available as a custom Enterprise add-on — escalate to CSM or sales team. Customer should contact their dedicated CSM to discuss custom rate limit pricing. In the meantime, suggest implementing caching and batching API calls.

subject: Loving NexaFlow — question about onboarding team
message: We've been using NexaFlow for 3 months now and it's transformed how we work! I have a quick question — we're hiring 5 more people and I want to create a structured onboarding workflow for new hires. Is there an HR onboarding template available? Also, can I assign an onboarding checklist task to a new hire before they've accepted their NexaFlow invite?
expected_resolution: Great use case! HR Onboarding template is available in the template library (search 'onboarding'). Tasks cannot be assigned to users who haven't accepted their invite yet — workaround: create tasks and assign to yourself, then reassign when they join. Also mention task templates feature for recurring onboarding flows.

subject: Pricing negotiation — can we get a discount?
message: Hi, we're a 20-person team currently on Growth ($49/month). We've been customers for 18 months. We're evaluating our SaaS spend and I wanted to ask — is there any discount available for long-term customers or if we commit to an annual plan? We'd be open to a 2-year commitment if the pricing is right.
expected_resolution: Escalate to sales team — pricing negotiation. Do not disclose discount thresholds or commit to any pricing. Acknowledge loyalty, mention that the team will be in touch to discuss options. Route to sales@nexaflow.io or CSM team.

subject: Integration error on WhatsApp
message: Hi, my Jira integration stopped working. Getting 'authentication failed' message.
expected_resolution: Jira API token likely expired. Go to Settings > Integrations > Jira and re-enter a fresh API token generated from id.atlassian.com.

subject: How to add team members
message: Hello! How do I add new people to my workspace? Where is that setting?
expected_resolution: Go to Settings > Members > Invite Members. Enter email addresses and select their role (Admin/Member/Guest). They'll get an invite email valid for 48 hours.

subject: App crashed and lost my work
message: The mobile app crashed and I lost 2 hours of task updates I did offline! Is there a way to recover?
expected_resolution: Offline changes are synced when connection restores. If app crashed before sync, changes may be lost. Escalate to engineering with device model and app version for investigation. Apologize and note this is a known edge case being fixed.

subject: Can I use NexaFlow on my phone?
message: Quick question — is there an iPhone app for NexaFlow?
expected_resolution: Yes! NexaFlow has an iOS app available on the App Store for iPhone (iOS 15+). Search 'NexaFlow' and log in with workspace credentials.

subject: Automation stopped working
message: My due date reminders stopped sending to Slack. Was working fine yesterday.
expected_resolution: Check Slack integration token — may have expired (90-day rotation). Settings > Integrations > Slack > Reconnect. Also verify the automation rule is still 'Active' in the Automations list.

subject: Wrong plan charge
message: I was charged $199 but I'm on the Growth plan which should be $49. Please help urgently!
expected_resolution: Escalate to billing team. Verify customer's current plan in admin dashboard. If overcharge confirmed, initiate refund for difference and escalate reason. Common cause: accidental upgrade click. Apologize and resolve same day.

subject: Export data question
message: Hi! How do I download all my project data? Need CSV format please.
expected_resolution: Go to Settings > Data & Privacy > Export Data. Choose CSV format and select scope. You'll receive a download link by email within 15 minutes.

subject: Login issue after password reset
message: I reset my password but now it's not accepting the new password on the app. Web works fine.
expected_resolution: Password reset token may have partially synced. Fix: on mobile app, log out completely > clear app cache (device Settings > NexaFlow > Clear Cache) > log in with new password. If fails, request new password reset.

subject: How to set task priorities
message: Where do I set priority on a task? I see Low, Medium, High but where is Urgent?
expected_resolution: Priority options are Low, Medium, High, and Critical (the highest — 'Urgent' isn't the label used). Open a task > click Priority field > select Critical. You can also set priority during task creation.

subject: Non-English message — Urdu support query
message: السلام علیکم۔ میں اپنی ٹیم کے لیے نیا ورک فلو بنانا چاہتا ہوں لیکن مجھے سمجھ نہیں آرہا کہ آٹومیشن رولز کیسے بناتے ہیں۔ کیا آپ اردو میں مدد کر سکتے ہیں؟
expected_resolution: Respond in Urdu if possible, or English with an apology for language limitation. Guide through automation rule creation: Automations > New Rule > select trigger, conditions, and action. Provide help center link: help.nexaflow.io/automation-rules.

subject: Can't find invoice history
message: I need last month's invoice for expense reporting. Where do I find it?
expected_resolution: Invoices are at Settings > Billing > Invoice History. Download as PDF. If invoice is missing, verify the billing email on file and check spam folder — invoices auto-sent on 1st of month.

subject: Gibberish/empty test message
message: asdfghjkl qwerty 123 test test !!!
expected_resolution: Unrecognizable message — respond politely asking the customer to describe their issue. 'Hi Kevin, it looks like your message may not have come through clearly. Could you tell us what you need help with today?'

subject: Remove a member from workspace
message: Hi! An employee left our company. How do I remove them from NexaFlow?
expected_resolution: Settings > Members > find the member > click the three-dot menu > Remove from Workspace. Their tasks stay but ownership transfers to workspace Owner. Recommend also revoking any shared invite links they had.

subject: Notification overload
message: Getting too many notifications. How to reduce them?
expected_resolution: Go to Settings > Notifications. Can configure: which events trigger notifications, notification channels (email/push/Slack), and digest frequency (instant/hourly/daily). Can also mute specific projects.

subject: Two-factor authentication question
message: Is there 2FA available? Our IT policy requires it.
expected_resolution: Yes, 2FA is available for all plans. Enable at Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Supports authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy) and SMS. Enterprise plan also supports SSO (SAML 2.0) for organizational 2FA enforcement.

subject: Task import failed
message: Tried to import tasks from CSV but getting 'import failed' error.
expected_resolution: Most likely cause: CSV format doesn't match NexaFlow's import template. Download the correct template at Settings > Import > Download Template. Ensure required columns (task name, status) are present. If format is correct and still failing, escalate to engineering.

subject: Workspace color theme
message: Is there a dark mode for the app? My eyes strain with the white interface.
expected_resolution: Dark mode is available on the mobile app (iOS and Android). On the web app, dark mode is currently not available. Suggest using browser-level dark mode extensions as a workaround. Note: cannot promise when web dark mode will be available.

subject: Angry about downtime last week
message: Your service was down for 3 hours last Tuesday and I lost an entire afternoon of work. We're on Growth plan. This is unacceptable. What are you going to do about it?
expected_resolution: Escalate: negative sentiment, SLA concern. Check status page for incident record. Apologize sincerely, confirm incident details, offer service credit per Growth SLA policy. Escalate to account manager if customer remains unsatisfied.

subject: Connect Slack to multiple channels
message: Can I send different automation notifications to different Slack channels?
expected_resolution: Yes! Each automation rule can send to a different Slack channel. When creating/editing an automation rule > Action: Send Slack message > select the specific channel for that rule. You can have separate rules for different projects sending to different channels.

subject: Want to talk about pricing
message: Hi, we have 30 users. Enterprise seems expensive. Can we negotiate the price?
expected_resolution: Escalate to sales team — pricing negotiation. Acknowledge interest, do not disclose flexibility. 'Hi Hamza, great question! For teams of your size I'd love to connect you with our sales team who can discuss the best options for you.' Route to sales@nexaflow.io.

subject: Can't log in — says account doesn't exist
message: I've been a NexaFlow customer for over a year and suddenly today when I try to log in it says 'account not found'. I haven't changed my email or password. My email is rachel.green@modernstacks.com. I have active tasks and projects I need to access urgently. This is very frustrating.
expected_resolution: Account lookup shows email should exist. Common cause: workspace was deleted by Owner (if customer isn't the Owner). Check account status in admin. If account exists, try password reset. If account was inadvertently deleted, escalate to engineering for potential data recovery (within 90 days).

subject: Setting up workspace for development team
message: Hi, I'm a engineering manager setting up NexaFlow for my 18-person dev team. We use GitHub heavily and want task-to-PR linking. We also want automated Slack messages when PRs are merged and linked tasks get completed. Can NexaFlow handle this workflow? What's the best way to set it up?
expected_resolution: Great use case! Full setup: 1) Connect GitHub integration, 2) Connect Slack integration, 3) Create automation rule: Trigger 'Task completed' + Condition 'Has GitHub PR linked' + Action 'Send Slack message to #dev-updates'. Walk through step by step. This is a Growth/Enterprise workflow.

subject: Mensaje en español — ayuda con integración
message: Hola, estoy teniendo problemas para conectar NexaFlow con nuestro Jira. El error dice 'Authentication failed' pero he verificado que mis credenciales son correctas. ¿Pueden ayudarme en español? Nuestro equipo no habla inglés muy bien.
expected_resolution: Respond in Spanish: El token de API de Jira posiblemente expiró. Ir a Ajustes > Integraciones > Jira > ingresar nuevo token generado desde id.atlassian.com > Guardar. Si el problema persiste, contactar soporte con el mensaje de error exacto.

subject: Data privacy and GDPR compliance
message: We are a UK-based company subject to GDPR. Before we can fully adopt NexaFlow we need to understand your data processing practices. Specifically: Where is our data stored? Do you have a Data Processing Agreement (DPA) available? Can we request deletion of all our data? What are your sub-processors? We may need to provide this to our DPO.
expected_resolution: Escalate to legal/compliance team — GDPR/legal query. Do not provide any data location details from memory. Acknowledge receipt, inform that the compliance team will respond. Route to compliance@nexaflow.io. SLA for compliance queries: Enterprise 24h, others 72h.

subject: Automation rules not working after plan downgrade
message: We downgraded from Growth to Starter plan last week (cost-cutting measure). Now I see that many of our automation rules show as 'Paused'. I understand the Starter plan has a 5-rule limit but I can't figure out which rules to keep. Can you tell me which rules have been paused and is there a way to prioritize which ones stay active?
expected_resolution: On downgrade, rules above the limit are paused (not deleted). Customer can see all rules in Automations list — paused ones are labeled. To activate a new one, must deactivate another first. Rules are not auto-prioritized. Suggest customer review and deactivate least-used rules. Offer to re-upgrade to Growth.

subject: All automation rules failing — URGENT
message: This is a follow-up to previous tickets. I am Chris Anderson, colleague of Michael Torres. Our entire automation system has been down for 4 days. We've had multiple tickets submitted and no real fix. Our operations are seriously impacted. I need escalation to someone technical who can actually diagnose the server-side issue. This is not a configuration problem — it worked for 6 months and suddenly stopped. Please look at our server logs. Our workspace ID is WS-48821.
expected_resolution: Escalate immediately — same organization as TKT-006 (nexgen-ops.com), multi-day unresolved outage. Check WS-48821 server logs. This is likely a workspace-level issue not a configuration problem. Assign to senior engineering. Provide proactive update within 2 hours.

subject: How to create recurring tasks
message: Hi! I manage weekly team standups and want to auto-create a 'Weekly Standup Prep' task every Monday morning. I also want a monthly task for our retrospective. Is there a recurring task feature in NexaFlow? I couldn't find it in the task creation screen.
expected_resolution: Recurring tasks are done via automation rules: Automations > New Rule > Trigger: Scheduled (select weekly Monday 8am) > Action: Create task (fill in template details). Repeat for monthly. The task itself won't say 'recurring' but the automation fires on schedule. Walk through setup.

subject: Bulk delete tasks
message: We have an old project with over 500 completed tasks that we want to archive or delete. Is there a bulk delete or bulk archive option? Deleting them one by one would take forever.
expected_resolution: Yes — in the project view, use the multi-select checkbox (click first task, Shift+click last task, or select all with Ctrl+A). Then use the bulk action toolbar that appears > Archive or Delete. For 500 tasks, do in batches of 100 to avoid timeout. Alternatively, archive the whole project.

subject: Integration with Zapier
message: Do you have a Zapier integration? We use Zapier to connect dozens of tools and it would be great if NexaFlow was part of that ecosystem. If not, is there a webhook option we could use with Zapier's webhook trigger?
expected_resolution: NexaFlow does not have a native Zapier app. Workaround for Growth/Enterprise: use webhooks. NexaFlow can send webhook events (task.created, task.updated, etc.) to Zapier's Catch Hook URL. For receiving from Zapier, use NexaFlow's webhook trigger (Enterprise) or the API (Enterprise). Detail the webhook setup.

subject: Cross-channel follow-up: still having Slack issues
message: Hi, I reached out via WhatsApp earlier about Slack automation reminders stopping. I tried the reconnect fix you mentioned but it's still not working. The integration shows as connected but no messages are going through. I've checked the channel name and it's correct. This has been broken for 5 days now.
expected_resolution: Cross-channel customer (also TKT-025). Reconnect already attempted. Escalate to engineering: check if Slack bot was removed from the workspace by a Slack admin. Verify Slack bot has posting permissions in the target channel. May need manual inspection of Slack app permissions.

subject: Very long support message — detailed workflow issue
message:
Hello NexaFlow Support Team, I hope this message finds you well. I'm writing to explain a complex workflow issue that has been causing significant disruption to our team of 22 people at Amplify Digital. We are on the Growth plan and have been customers since January 2025. I want to give you full context so you can help us effectively.

Background: We run a digital marketing agency with multiple client accounts. Each client has their own project in NexaFlow, and we use automation rules extensively to manage deliverables, deadlines, and client communications. Our workflow is as follows: when a task is created with the tag 'client-deliverable', it triggers several automation rules: (1) sends a Slack notification to the #client-updates channel with the task name and due date, (2) assigns the task to the relevant client project manager based on a custom field called 'client-owner', (3) creates a Google Calendar event for the due date, and (4) sends an automated email reminder 2 days before the due date.

The problem: Since approximately March 10th, 2026, step (3) — the Google Calendar event creation — has stopped working. However, steps (1), (2), and (4) are all still functioning correctly. The Google Calendar integration shows as 'Connected' in Settings. When I check the automation rule logs (Settings > Automations > [rule name] > Execution History), I can see that the calendar action shows as 'Attempted' but with status 'Failed — External API error'. The error code in the log is GC-403.

What I've tried: I've already tried the standard fix of disconnecting and reconnecting the Google Calendar integration. I did this on March 12th and again on March 14th. Each time, after reconnecting, the integration works for approximately 2-3 new task creations, then fails again. I've also checked our Google Workspace admin console and I cannot see any restrictions on third-party app access. I've tried with two different Google accounts (both have access to the same shared team calendar). I've also verified that the calendar ID in the automation rule is correct — it points to our 'Team Deadlines' calendar which is a shared calendar that all team members can edit.

Additional context: Our Google Workspace is on the Business Standard plan. We have approximately 50-80 task creations per day. The failure seems to be intermittent in a pattern — it works for a few tasks after reconnection, then fails. I suspect this might be a rate limiting issue on either Google's side or NexaFlow's side, but I'm not sure. I've also noticed that the failures tend to cluster around 9-10 AM PKT when our team starts work for the day and creates most of their tasks.

I would really appreciate a thorough investigation of this issue. If this is a known bug, please let me know the ETA for a fix. If it's a configuration issue on our end, please provide specific guidance. We have a major client presentation on March 25th and having our calendar sync working is critical for that deadline. I'm available for a screen share session if that would help diagnose the issue faster.

Thank you for your time and help. I look forward to your response.
expected_resolution: Detailed bug report. GC-403 = Google Calendar rate limit or permission denial. Pattern (works then fails) + morning clustering = rate limit issue. NexaFlow Google Calendar API calls may be hitting Google's per-calendar rate limit (900 calls/minute/user across all apps). Investigate API call volume. Escalate to engineering. Interim fix: stagger task creation or reduce automation frequency. Engineering ticket required.

subject: Follow up: automation still not working as expected
message: Hi, I wrote in via email last week about due date reminder automations (TKT-002). The setup I made seems to be working but the Slack message content isn't right — it just says the task name but not who it's assigned to or which project it belongs to. How do I customize the message template to include those details?
expected_resolution: Cross-channel customer (also TKT-002 via email). Slack message templates support dynamic variables: {{task.name}}, {{task.assignee}}, {{task.project}}, {{task.due_date}}. In the automation rule > Action: Send Slack message > Message field > type the template with variables. Example: 'Reminder: {{task.name}} in {{task.project}} is due on {{task.due_date}}, assigned to {{task.assignee}}'.

subject: Account verification and onboarding
message: Hi, I just signed up and need help completing my profile and understanding the first steps.
expected_resolution: Welcome! Complete profile at Settings > Profile. First steps: create your first project, invite teammates, and explore the template library. For a guided walkthrough, click 'Start Onboarding Tour' from the dashboard. Help center: help.nexaflow.io.

subject: API documentation access issue
message: We just upgraded to Enterprise and I'm trying to access the API documentation at docs.nexaflow.io/api but it keeps saying I need to be logged in. I am logged in to my NexaFlow account. Is there a separate login for the docs?
expected_resolution: API docs require Enterprise login: visit docs.nexaflow.io/api and click 'Login with NexaFlow'. Use same credentials as the app. If still failing, ensure the account that upgraded has admin/owner role. API tokens are generated separately at Settings > API > Generate Token once logged into the docs.

subject: NexaFlow for non-profit — any discount?
message: Hi NexaFlow, we're a registered non-profit organization in Ghana using your platform for project management across our volunteer programs. We have about 30 users and the Enterprise plan pricing is challenging for our budget. Do you offer non-profit discounts? We'd love to continue using NexaFlow but may need to look at alternatives if we can't afford it.
expected_resolution: Escalate to sales — pricing negotiation for non-profit. Do not commit to any discount. Acknowledge their mission warmly, inform that the team has options for non-profit organizations and will be in touch. Route to sales@nexaflow.io with 'non-profit inquiry' flag.

subject: Lost access to billing — Owner left company
message: The person who originally created our NexaFlow workspace left our company last month. They were the Owner and apparently the only one with billing access. Now none of us can access or change the billing settings. The account is about to renew and we need to update the payment card. How do we transfer ownership?
expected_resolution: Ownership transfer when original Owner is unavailable: Escalate to support team. Customer needs to verify they are authorized representative of the organization (business email domain match, LinkedIn verification). Process: support transfers ownership to new designated admin. Requires identity verification. Urgent given renewal timing.

subject: Tasks disappearing after update
message: Something very strange is happening. After our team updated to the latest web app version (we clear cache and refresh), about 15 tasks in our 'Q1 Marketing Campaign' project seem to have vanished. They're not in the archive either. This is urgent as we have a campaign going live tomorrow.
expected_resolution: Escalate immediately — potential data loss. Check audit log for bulk delete actions (Settings > Audit Log). Check if another Admin accidentally archived/deleted. Engineering should check database for soft-deleted records — within 90-day recovery window. Escalate as P1.

subject: Cannot create more than 5 automation rules on Starter
message: Hi, I'm trying to create a 6th automation rule but getting an error saying I've reached my plan limit. I'm on the free Starter plan. Is there any way to get more rules without upgrading? These automations are really important to us.
expected_resolution: Starter plan limit is 5 active automation rules — this is a hard plan limit. Options: 1) Deactivate one existing rule to make room, 2) Upgrade to Growth ($49/mo) for 50 rules, 3) Review if any current rules can be combined. Show value prop of Growth upgrade. Cannot increase Starter limits.

subject: Excellent product — feature suggestion
message: I just wanted to write in to say that NexaFlow has genuinely transformed how our sustainability consulting team works. The automation rules have saved us probably 10+ hours per week. I do have one feature suggestion: it would be amazing if tasks could have sub-task dependencies (e.g., Task B cannot start until Task A is complete) with visual dependency mapping like a Gantt chart. Is this on the roadmap? This would make NexaFlow perfect for us.
expected_resolution: Thank the customer warmly. For dependencies: basic task dependencies (blocking) are available — on a task, click 'Add Dependency' to link to blocking tasks. For Gantt/timeline view: available in the Timeline view (switch from Board to Timeline at top of project). Cannot comment on roadmap. Log feature request for enhanced dependency mapping.

subject: Suspected unauthorized access to our account
message: I received an email notification that someone logged into our NexaFlow workspace from an IP address in a country none of our team members are in (we're all US-based, the login was from Vietnam). I'm worried our account has been compromised. We have confidential client project data in NexaFlow. What should I do immediately? Is our data safe?
expected_resolution: Escalate immediately to security team — potential account compromise. Immediate actions: 1) Invalidate all sessions (Settings > Security > Sign Out All Devices), 2) Reset password immediately, 3) Enable 2FA if not already enabled, 4) Review audit log for recent changes. Security team to investigate login IP. This is a P0 security incident — route to #security-incidents.
